name: azure-ai-agent
description: Agentic coding assistant powered by an Azure AI Foundry deployed model (e.g. GPT-5.4). Reads, writes, edits files and runs commands in your workspace, with streaming, image input, diff previews and per-workspace instructions.

azure-ai-agent.endpoint.markdownDescription: Azure OpenAI / AI Foundry endpoint URL. Example: `https://models4dev.cognitiveservices.azure.com/`

azure-ai-agent.apiKey.markdownDescription: **Deprecated** plain-text API key fallback. Prefer **Azure AI: Set API Key** (stored in VS Code SecretStorage).

azure-ai-agent.deployment.description: Deployment name from Azure AI Foundry.

azure-ai-agent.systemPrompt.description: Optional override for the built-in agent system prompt.

azure-ai-agent.instructionsFiles.description: Workspace files to auto-prepend to the system prompt (first match wins).

azure-ai-agent.maxCompletionTokens.description: Maximum tokens for a single completion.

azure-ai-agent.maxIterations.description: Maximum agent loop iterations per user request.

azure-ai-agent.approvalMode.description: When the agent should ask before running a tool.

azure-ai-agent.diffPreview.description: Show a diff editor before applying write_file / edit_file / apply_patch when approval is required.

azure-ai-agent.streamResponses.description: Stream assistant text token-by-token (when no tool calls are pending).

azure-ai-agent.persistHistory.description: Persist chat history per workspace across reloads.

azure-ai-agent.allowedShells.description: Shells the agent is allowed to invoke for run_command.

azure-ai-agent.commandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for shell commands.

azure-ai-agent.maxFileBytes.description: Hard cap on bytes returned by read_file.

azure-ai-agent.imageDetail.description: Image fidelity hint passed to multimodal requests.

azure-ai-agent.debug.description: Mirror agent loop traffic to the Azure AI Agent Output channel.

azure-ai-agent.webBrowsing.enabled.description: Allow the agent to call web_fetch and web_search tools.

azure-ai-agent.webBrowsing.maxBytes.description: Maximum bytes web_fetch will read from a single URL.

azure-ai-agent.webBrowsing.allowedDomain.markdownDescription: If non-empty, web_fetch will *only* fetch from these domains. Subdomains match. Wildcards: `*.example.com`.

azure-ai-agent.webBrowsing.blockedDomain.markdownDescription: Domains web_fetch will refuse. Evaluated before the allowlist. Subdomains match. Wildcards: `*.example.com`.

azure-ai-agent.webSearch.provider.markdownDescription: Search backend. **duckduckgo** needs no key. **tavily** / **brave** need an API key — set with `Azure AI: Set Web Search API Key`.

azure-ai-agent.webSearch.apiKey.markdownDescription: **Deprecated** plain-text fallback for the web-search API key. Prefer **Azure AI: Set Web Search API Key** (stored in VS Code SecretStorage).

azure-ai-agent.proxy.markdownDescription: HTTP proxy URL used by web_fetch / web_search (e.g. `http://corp-proxy:8080`). If empty, falls back to VS Code's `http.proxy` setting and finally to `HTTPS_PROXY` env.

azure-ai-agent.historyCompressionThresho.description: When the conversation grows beyond this many messages, older middle turns are folded into a single placeholder so recent turns stay verbatim.

azure-ai-agent.testAfterEdit.description: When the agent edits foo.ts and a sibling foo.test.ts / foo.spec.ts exists, append a hint nudging it to run them.

azure-ai-agent.cost.inputUsdPerMtok.description: USD per 1M prompt tokens for your deployment. Used to compute the session cost shown in the status bar.

azure-ai-agent.cost.outputUsdPerMtok.description: USD per 1M completion tokens for your deployment.

azure-ai-agent.safety.scrubSecrets.markdownDescription: Redact obvious secrets (API keys, tokens, JWTs, private keys) from `read_file` / `run_command` output before sending to the model.

azure-ai-agent.safety.autoApproveCommand.markdownDescription: Regex patterns. A `run_command` whose command matches *any* listed pattern is auto-approved even in `destructive` approval mode. Example: `^npm test`, `^pytest( |$)`, `^git status`.

azure-ai-agent.ui.compactMode.description: Use a denser compact chat layout with reduced spacing and collapsed tool logs by default.

azure-ai-agent.mcp.servers.markdownDescription: MCP stdio servers to launch for discovery/invocation. Each item: `{ id, command, args?, cwd?, env?, enabled? }`.

azure-ai-agent.mcp.approvalMode.description: Approval mode specifically for MCP tool calls.

commands.title: Azure AI: Ask Agent About Selection
Azure AI: Generate Code From Description
Azure AI: Clear Stored API Key
Azure AI: Attach Image to Next Message
Azure AI: Set Web Search API Key (SecretStorage)
Azure AI: Clear Stored Web Search API Key
Azure AI: Show Discovered MCP Tools
